title: Adax WiFi Heaters
description: Matterbridge plugin for Adax WiFi heaters

debug.title: Enable Debug
debug.description: Enable debug logging for the plugin

unregisterOnShutdown.title: Unregister On Shutdown
unregisterOnShutdown.description: Unregister all devices on shutdown (development only)

accountId.title: Account ID
accountId.description: Your numeric Adax account ID from the Adax WiFi app (under Account)

clientSecret.title: Client Secret
clientSecret.description: Adax API client secret from Adax WiFi app: Account → Remote user client API → Add Credential

pollInterval.title: Poll interval (ms)
pollInterval.description: How often the Adax API is polled (minimum 10000)
